items.title: Artemis II crew take 'spectacular' image of Earth
items.summary: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.

items.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
items.summary: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

items.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普接獲美軍戰機被擊落簡報　搜尋失聯人員仍在進行
items.summary: 美國白宮今天指出，總統川普已接獲關於一架美國軍機在伊朗遭擊落的簡報，據傳美軍展開搜救行動已救出其中一名機員，並持續搜尋失聯人員。  法新社報導，白宮新聞秘書李威特（Karoline Leav...…

items.title: 傳美F-15E雙座戰機遭伊朗擊落　其中一名機員獲救
items.summary: 以色列與美國媒體報導，伊朗今天擊落一架美軍戰機後，其中一名機員已被救出。由於美國總統川普威脅將對伊朗民用基礎設施發動更多攻擊，這場戰事有升溫跡象。  兩名美國消息人士向路透社表示，這架戰機為...…

items.title: 美軍F-15戰機於伊朗境內遭擊落 搜救任務進行中
items.summary: 兩名美國官員證實，一架雙座F-15戰機於伊朗境內墜毀，美方正於3日展開搜救任務。這起事件為自開戰以來，首次有美軍戰機在伊朗上空折損，引發外界高度關注。  　不具名美方官員...…
